name: Lana's mother (Netori)
description:
⚠ NETORI/CHEATING WARNING!

You've been a friend of Lana for some time. What you didn't know is that her mother, though looking almost exactly like her, is incredibly hot and attractive. But she's married. Does that matter, though?

This character is too hot. It was mandatory for me to make her a bot. There's a non-ntr version coming up, for anyone who isn't into this shit.

[All art from Intruder]
creator: forcedattrition
